heading: Grant extended to New Mexico and Arizona
label: 646 Grant extended to New Mexico and Arizona
text: All the provisions of sections 641, 642 and 643 of this title are extended to the States of New Mexico and Arizona, and the said States upon complying with the provisions of said sections shall be entitled to have and receive all of the benefits therein conferred upon the States.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was repealed by , , .Section 643 of this titlePub. L. 94–579, title VII, § 704(a)90 Stat. 2792Oct. 21, 1976
